overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy running through a desert landscape during golden hour. The character navigates a dirt trail through red rock formations and sparse vegetation including Joshua trees and cacti, approaching a distinctive rock formation topped with a large bird-like structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert trail with Joshua trees and wildflowers

agents.ego_description: Aloy is running steadily along a dirt path through a vegetated desert area, carrying a bow on her back

entered.detail: Distinctive spiky desert tree with multiple branches
Clusters of bright yellow flowers growing along the trail sides
Tall green cactus visible among the rocks
Large reddish-orange rock mountain with layered striations
Worn dirt path winding through the desert terrain

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Aloy running through a moderately vegetated desert trail lined with Joshua trees and yellow wildflowers. The camera follows from behind as she moves toward a large red rock formation visible in the distance. The warm golden hour lighting casts long shadows across the dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert approaching monumental rock formation

events.description: vegetation density decreases significantly as the terrain opens into a wide desert basin
character begins curving path around the base of the large rock formation

agents.ego_description: Aloy continues running while approaching a distinctive rock formation topped with a bird-like structure, navigating around its base

entered.detail: Large metallic or stone bird structure perched atop the rock formation
Snow-capped mountain peaks visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wide-open desert basin with sparse vegetation. Aloy approaches a massive red rock formation crowned with a bird-like statue. Snow-capped mountains appear on the distant horizon. The character curves around the rock formation as the camera maintains its third-person follow perspective.

scene_state.functional_zone: barren desert trail toward distant rock arch

events.description: terrain becomes more barren with rocky outcrops replacing the large formation

agents.ego_description: Aloy runs through open desert terrain toward a distant rock arch, with the large formation now behind her

entered.detail: Natural rock arch formation visible in the far distance
Scattered large rocks and boulders along the trail sides

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Aloy traversing increasingly barren desert terrain with scattered boulders. The large bird-crowned rock formation recedes into the background left as she heads toward a distant rock arch. The warm golden light continues to bathe the red rock landscape as the exploration continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a lush desert trail that gradually opens into a vast, barren basin of red rock. It begins with Aloy running along a dirt path lined with Joshua trees and yellow wildflowers, moving toward a distant red rock formation under the long shadows of the golden hour. As the terrain expands into a wide-open basin, the camera follows her around a massive rock formation crowned with a bird-like statue, revealing snow-capped mountains on the far horizon. The scene then shifts toward increasingly barren ground scattered with boulders, with the bird-crowned peak receding into the background as she heads toward a distant rock arch. The warm golden light continues to bathe the landscape as the camera maintains its steady pursuit across the red desert.
